content:
🚨 THE FUTURE OF LAW WILL NOT BE ARGUED. IT WILL BE ARCHITECTED. ⚖️🤖
Artificial Intelligence is no longer a concept for tomorrow—it is transforming the legal profession today.
From AI-assisted legal research and predictive analytics to Online Dispute Resolution (ODR), digital evidence, and intelligent case management, technology is fundamentally changing how justice is delivered. Recent milestones, including the appearance of AI legal assistance before the UK courts, signal a future where legal practice and technology are becoming increasingly interconnected.
The real question is no longer whether AI will reshape the legal profession.
The question is: Are we prepared to lead this transformation responsibly?
To explore one of the most significant shifts in modern legal history, MedArb International, in association with DRF Conflict Management Solutions LLP, proudly presents an exclusive Global Online Symposium:
⚖️ AI & LAW: Navigating Disputes in the Age of ODR 2.0
Join renowned international experts as they examine how Artificial Intelligence is reshaping courts, arbitration, mediation, regulation, and the future of dispute resolution.
Distinguished International Speakers
🎙️ Mr. Tony Guise (United Kingdom)
From E-Filing to E-Justice: How the UK's Digital Courts Model is Reshaping Justice
🎙️ Dr. Magdalena Lagiewska, FCIArb (Poland)
AI as an Arbitrator? Legal and Ethical Limits of Decision-Making in International Arbitration
🎙️ Dr. Pallab Das
Deepfakes, Defamation & Digital Evidence: Mediating Identity-Based AI Disputes
🎙️ Er. Krishnakumar Mani
AI Liability and Disputes: Who Pays When Algorithms Fail?
🎙️ Mr. Vishwa Badrinath
Arbitration and Artificial Intelligence: An Analysis
Why You Should Attend
✅ Discover how AI is transforming litigation, arbitration, mediation, and ODR.
✅ Understand the legal, ethical, regulatory, and governance challenges surrounding AI.
✅ Explore emerging issues including deepfakes, digital evidence, algorithmic accountability, and AI liability.
✅ Gain insights from internationally respected legal and technology experts.
✅ Network with judges, lawyers, arbitrators, mediators, policymakers, academicians, researchers, corporate leaders, technologists, and students from around the world.
📅 12 July 2026 (Sunday)
🕥 10:30 AM – 12:30 PM (IST)
💻 Live on Webex
🎟️ FREE Global Registration
📧 president@medarb.in | info@medarbinternational.com
📞 +91 9841098484
🌐 Register Now: https://lnkd.in/gayMbejU
The future of justice is not only digital—it is intelligent.
Be part of the global dialogue shaping the next generation of law, dispute resolution, and Artificial Intelligence
Join us. Learn from global experts. Lead the future of justice.
